metadata.description: CPA-reviewed internal controls triggered when cash runway falls below industry benchmark
metadata.coverage: All 4-digit NAICS codes via sector inheritance + explicit overrides

universal_cash_preservation.title: Weekly Cash Flow Variance Review
universal_cash_preservation.description: Compare actual inflows/outflows to forecast. Flag variances more than 10%, document root cause, and adjust next week's disbursements.

universal_cash_preservation.title: Paying Vendor Bills over Time
universal_cash_preservation.description: Categorize payables: Critical (keep operations running) vs Deferrable. Negotiate extended terms or partial payments on deferrable vendors.
universal_cash_preservation.audit_trail: Payment priority matrix + vendor communication log

universal_cash_preservation.title: Increase How Quickly You Get Paid
universal_cash_preservation.description: Daily aging review. Apply contractual late fees, offer 2% early payment discounts, and escalate balances more than 30 days to collections.
universal_cash_preservation.audit_trail: long-term unpaid sales invoices report + collection activity log

controls.title: Crop/Livestock Insurance Verification
controls.description: Confirm coverage is active. File weather/market loss claims immediately. Track claim status weekly.

controls.title: Equipment Lease Deferral
controls.description: Shift capital purchases to short-term rentals or cooperative sharing. Renegotiate lease payment schedules during low cash periods.

controls.title: Royalty & Severance Tax Timing
controls.description: Align tax payments with production cash cycles. Request payment plans if allowed by state. Track accruals vs cash paid.

controls.title: Supply Contract Renegotiation
controls.description: Switch to just-in-time delivery for drilling/mining supplies. Consolidate vendors for volume discounts.
controls.audit_trail: Vendor contract amendments + purchase order (PO) tracker

controls.title: Regulatory Rate Case Monitoring
controls.description: Track approved rate adjustments. Accelerate billing cycles for commercial accounts during cash shortfalls.
controls.audit_trail: Rate case docket + billing cycle report

controls.title: Infrastructure CapEx Deferral
controls.description: Postpone non-safety-critical maintenance. Document deferrals for regulatory compliance reviews.
controls.audit_trail: CapEx deferral register + safety compliance log

controls.title: Progress Billing Acceleration
controls.description: Submit draw requests within 24 hours of milestone completion. Track retainage separately and follow up weekly.

controls.title: Subcontractor Payment Alignment
controls.description: Align sub payments with client receipts. Require lien waivers before release. Use pay-when-paid clauses where legal.
controls.audit_trail: Sub payment schedule + lien waiver tracker

31.sector: Manufacturing (Food, Textile, Wood, Paper, Chemical, Plastics, Rubber, Nonmetallic)

controls.title: Inventory Reduction Protocol
controls.description: Implement JIT ordering for slow-movers. Liquidate obsolete stock via secondary markets or vendor returns.

controls.title: Scrap & Rework Tracking
controls.description: Monitor scrap rates daily. Investigate more than 2% variance. Adjust machine settings or supplier quality controls.

controls.title: Raw Material Hedging Review
controls.description: Lock in prices for volatile inputs. Switch to alternative suppliers with due date of 60 days terms during cash constraints.

controls.title: Batch Size Optimization
controls.description: Reduce batch sizes to free up working capital tied in Work-In-Progress (WIP). Track changeover costs vs cash benefit.
controls.audit_trail: Batch size log + Work-In-Progress (WIP) valuation report

33.sector: Manufacturing (Metal, Machinery, Computer, Electrical, Transportation, Furniture, Medical, Misc)

controls.title: Tooling & Equipment Lease Review
controls.description: Lease instead of buy new tooling. Sell idle equipment. Track depreciation vs cash recovery.

controls.title: WIP Billing Acceleration
controls.description: Bill on milestone completion rather than delivery. Require customer purchase orders before production starts.
controls.audit_trail: WIP aging report + customer purchase order (PO) tracker

controls.title: Inventory Turnover Acceleration
controls.description: Run targeted business-to-business (B2B) promotions on slow-moving SKUs. Negotiate terms to let another business hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment terms) with suppliers.
controls.audit_trail: Promotion Return on Investment (ROI) report + agreements to let another business hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment)

controls.title: Customer Credit Limit Review
controls.description: Tighten credit terms for accounts more than 45 days. Require Cash-on-Delivery (COD) for new orders until balance drops below threshold.
controls.audit_trail: Credit limit change log + Cash-on-Delivery (COD) policy

44.sector: Retail Trade (Motor Vehicle, Building, Food, Clothing, Electronics, etc.)

controls.title: Markdown Optimization
controls.description: Use dynamic pricing for slow inventory. Bundle slow/fast movers. Track sell-through weekly.

controls.title: Shrinkage Control Audit
controls.description: Conduct surprise cycle counts. Review CCTV for high-theft SKUs. Implement receipt verification at exits.
controls.audit_trail: Cycle count sheets + shrinkage variance report

45.sector: Retail Trade (General Merchandise, Health, Gas, Florist, Office, Used, Misc)

controls.title: Seasonal Inventory Liquidation
controls.description: Clear out-of-season stock at 30-50% discount. Use flash sales or wholesale liquidators. Track recovery rate.

controls.title: Vendor Return Program
controls.description: Maximize return windows for slow-moving goods. Negotiate stock rotation agreements with distributors.

48.sector: Transportation & Warehousing (Air, Rail, Water, Truck, Transit, Pipeline, Scenic, Support)

controls.title: Fuel Surcharge Optimization
controls.description: Adjust fuel surcharges monthly based on index. Pre-negotiate fuel card terms during cash shortfalls.

controls.title: Route & Load Consolidation
controls.description: Eliminate empty miles. Combine LTL shipments. Track fuel cost per revenue mile weekly.
controls.audit_trail: Route efficiency report + load board logs

49.sector: Postal Service, Couriers, Messengers, Warehousing & Storage

controls.title: Volume-Based Carrier Negotiation
controls.description: Consolidate shipments with preferred carriers for volume discounts. Renegotiate rates quarterly.
controls.audit_trail: Carrier contract log + volume discount report

controls.title: Space Utilization Audit
controls.description: Sublease unused warehouse space. Implement density tracking. Charge accessorial fees for slow-moving client inventory.

51.sector: Information (Publishing, Broadcasting, Telecom, Computing, Data, Web, Libraries)

controls.title: Subscription Churn Reduction
controls.description: Offer annual prepay discounts. Implement collection management for failed payments. Track MRR weekly.

controls.title: Cloud Cost Optimization
controls.description: Audit unused cloud resources. Switch to reserved instances. Track spend vs budget weekly.

controls.title: Liquidity Buffer Maintenance
controls.description: Maintain minimum regulatory spendable cash ratios. Pre-arrange revolving credit lines before cash shortfalls hit.
controls.audit_trail: Liquidity ratio report + credit line agreements

controls.title: Claims/Loan Loss Provision Review
controls.description: Accelerate collections on delinquent accounts. Adjust reserves based on actual loss experience, not just models.
controls.audit_trail: Collection activity log + reserve adjustment memo

controls.title: Rent Collection Acceleration
controls.description: Implement auto-pay mandates. Offer small discounts for early payment. Evict/replace non-paying tenants quickly.

controls.title: Vacancy Reduction Protocol
controls.description: Offer move-in specials. Partner with local employers for corporate housing. Track days vacant vs market avg.

controls.title: WIP Billing Acceleration
controls.description: Bill weekly instead of monthly. Require client purchase orders before work begins. Track unbilled hours daily.
controls.audit_trail: WIP aging report + client purchase order (PO) tracker

controls.title: Scope Creep Control
controls.description: Document all change requests. Require written approval + additional deposit before out-of-scope work.

controls.title: Intercompany Cash Sweeping
controls.description: Implement daily cash concentration. Pool subsidiary balances to offset deficits. Track sweep transactions.

controls.title: Overhead Allocation Review
controls.description: Reduce corporate allocations to struggling subsidiaries. Reallocate resources to cash-positive units.

controls.title: Labor Scheduling Optimization
controls.description: Align staffing to contract volumes. Cross-train staff to avoid overtime. Track labor cost per contract.
controls.audit_trail: Schedule vs actual report + overtime log

controls.title: Contract Margin Review
controls.description: Renegotiate low-price contracts. Exit unprofitable accounts. Track money earned per client.

controls.title: Tuition Prepayment Incentives
controls.description: Offer 5% discount for semester prepayment. Implement payment plans with auto-debit. Track enrollment cash flow.

controls.title: Grant & Aid Disbursement Tracking
controls.description: Accelerate federal/state grant submissions. Track disbursement timelines. Follow up on delayed payments.

controls.title: Insurance Verification & Pre-Authorization
controls.description: Verify coverage before service. Track denied claims daily. Appeal within 7 days of denial.

controls.title: Supply Cost Optimization
controls.description: Standardize to GPO contracts. Track usage vs patient volume. Substitute generics where clinically appropriate.
controls.audit_trail: Supply usage report + GPO compliance log

controls.title: Advance Ticket Sales Push
controls.description: Offer early-bird discounts. Sell season passes. Track advance sales vs historical baseline.

controls.title: Venue/Equipment Rental Optimization
controls.description: Rent idle facilities/equipment during off-peak. Partner with local organizations for shared use.

controls.title: Food Waste Tracking
controls.description: Weigh/prep waste daily. Adjust par levels. Track waste by menu item and remove low-price/high-waste dishes.

controls.title: Prepaid Revenue & Gift Card Push
controls.description: Promote prepaid gift cards (5-10% bonus). Offer deposit-based reservations for large parties. Track redemption liability.
controls.audit_trail: Gift card sales log + redemption tracker

81.sector: Other Services (Repair, Personal Care, Death Care, Laundry, Religious, Civic, Private Households)

controls.title: Membership/Retainer Prepayment
controls.description: Convert transactional clients to retainers. Offer annual prepay discounts. Track customer turnover (churn) vs cash flow.

controls.title: Supply Inventory Reduction
controls.description: Switch to just-in-time ordering for consumables. Return excess inventory to suppliers where possible.
controls.audit_trail: Inventory reduction log + supplier return records

controls.title: Grant & Appropriation Drawdown
controls.description: Accelerate submission of expenditure reports. Track appropriation vs actual spend. Follow up on delayed disbursements.

controls.title: Interfund Borrowing Compliance
controls.description: Utilize interfund loans per statutory limits. Document repayment schedules. Track fund balance ratios.

controls.title: Change Order Documentation
controls.description: Require signed change orders before work. Track unbilled changes separately. Bill within 48 hours of completion.

controls.title: Floorplan Financing Optimization
controls.description: Rotate inventory to minimize floorplan interest. Return slow-movers to auction. Track days supply vs financing cost.

controls.title: Seasonal Clearance Acceleration
controls.description: Clear out-of-season stock at 30-50% discount. Use flash sales or wholesale liquidators. Track recovery rate.

5415.title: Computer Systems Design and Related Services

controls.title: Milestone Billing Enforcement
controls.description: Bill on sprint completion. Require client acceptance sign-off before next phase. Track unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) daily.
controls.audit_trail: Sprint completion log + client acceptance records

controls.title: Prepaid Revenue & Gift Card Push
controls.description: Promote prepaid gift cards (5-10% bonus). Offer deposit-based reservations for large parties. Track redemption liability.
controls.audit_trail: Gift card sales log + redemption tracker

controls.title: Patient Payment Collection at Visit
controls.description: Collect copays/deductibles at check-in. Offer payment plans for balances >$200. Track collection rate weekly.
controls.audit_trail: Collection rate report + payment plan agreements
